question: Are saltwater crocodiles related to alligators?
context: Crocodiles belong to the family Crocodylinae.
Alligators belong to the family Alligatoridae.
Crocodylinae and Alligatoridae both belong to the order Crocodilia.
response:
<reasoning>
Saltwater crocodiles belong to the family Crocodylinae.
Alligators belong to the family Alligatoridae.
Crocodylinae and Alligatoridae both belong to the order Crocodilia.
Organisms in the same order share a common ancestor.
Saltwater crocodiles and alligators are both members of the order Crocodilia.
Saltwater crocodiles are related to alligators.
<answer> Yes
